name: IdsDmClmDmAgntMbrExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main AS (SELECT DISTINCT a.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,a.AGNT_ID,a.AGNT_NM,m.MBR_UNIQ_KEY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.Agnt a JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SubGrp_Lvl_Agnt sa ON a.AGNT_SK=sa.AGNT_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cm ON sa.SUBGRP_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK=cm.CD_MPPNG_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR m ON m.SUBGRP_SK=sa.SUBGRP_SK WHERE cm.TRGT_CD='AGENTRCRD' AND '@{pipeline().parameters.DatamartDate}'>=sa.EFF_DT_SK AND '@{pipeline().parameters.DatamartDate}'<=sa.TERM_DT_SK AND m.MBR_UNIQ_KEY<>0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT a.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,a.AGNT_ID,a.AGNT_NM,m.MBR_UNIQ_KEY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.Agnt a JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.Sub_Lvl_Agnt sa ON a.AGNT_SK=sa.AGNT_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cm ON sa.SUB_LVL_AGNT_ROLE_TYP_CD_SK=cm.CD_MPPNG_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR m ON m.SUB_SK=sa.SUB_SK WHERE cm.TRGT_CD='AGENTRCRD' AND '@{pipeline().parameters.DatamartDate}'>=sa.EFF_DT_SK AND '@{pipeline().parameters.DatamartDate}'<=sa.TERM_DT_SK AND m.MBR_UNIQ_KEY<>0), cd AS (SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK,TRGT_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG), lkp AS (SELECT main.*,cd.TRGT_CD AS temp_SRC_SYS_CD FROM main LEFT JOIN cd ON main.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=cd.CD_MPPNG_SK), xfrm AS (SELECT CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(temp_SRC_SYS_CD))='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE temp_SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD,AGNT_ID,MBR_UNIQ_KEY,AGNT_NM,@{pipeline().parameters.DataMartRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM lkp) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD,AGNT_ID,MBR_UNIQ_KEY,AGNT_NM,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM xfrm

Annotations:
Write CLM_DM_AGNT_MBR Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmProdDmDedctCmpntLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS AGNT, MBR Tables;
Job Name: IdsDmClmDmAgntMbrExtr
